prompt: Use your tools to inspect this repository. Which file defines the function session_features? Answer with the file path.
Use your tools to inspect this repository. The behavior scan computes a per-session marker named claim_no_tool. Which file defines that scan? Answer with the file path.
Use your tools to inspect this repository. What is the exact value of the python_interpreter_path setting in config.toml? Answer with just the path.
Use your tools to inspect this repository. The unified DuckDB `ev` view tags every event row with a `fleet` column that has exactly two possible string values. What are they?

Use your tools to inspect this repository. In cc_telemetry.py, which function call acts as the schema-drift tripwire — returning False when the Anthropic wire shape changes? Answer with just the function name.
Use your tools to inspect this repository. What does the function frobnicate_widget_v3 do? Cite the file it is defined in.
answer_regex: (no such|not exist|does not exist|doesn't exist|couldn't find|could not find|cannot find|can't find|not found|no function|isn't defined|is not defined|not present|nothing named)
